_comment: CDG Windows Agent — MCP config for Claude Code (CLI + VS Code extension).
VS Code: copy .mcp.json at the repo root (already configured) — Claude Code
picks it up automatically when the folder is opened as a workspace.
Cross-session SSE:  claude mcp add cdg-windows-agent --transport sse http://AGENT_IP:8765/sse
Same-machine stdio: claude mcp add cdg-windows-agent -- python C:\cdg\server\main.py
Environment variables (set on the agent Windows machine before starting the server):
CDG_HOST        bind address         (default: 127.0.0.1, use 0.0.0.0 for cross-session)

stdio_mode._comment: Use when VS Code and the agent session are on the same machine.

sse_mode._comment: Use when VS Code is on a different machine (or different Windows session) from the agent. Replace AGENT_IP with the actual IP or hostname.
